intro.primaryText: Sub Sole Films is a creative video agency located in the heart of Bern's old town.
intro.secondaryText: We produce visual content and give your corporate communication the right visual language.

cta.title: Ready to bring your vision to life?
cta.subtitle: A short message is all it takes:
cta.languages: We speak German, English, Spanish and French.

step1.title: Your Idea
step1.description: Share your vision with us. We're listening.

step2.title: Our Concept
step2.description: We transform your vision and ideas into a concept through scripts, mood boards, storyboards, and more.

step3.title: Production
step3.description: Lighting, wiring, filming, staging – shoot days mean fun and hard work! We love it.

step4.title: Post-Production
step4.description: The product comes together in the editing room. Necessary adjustments are made in consultation with you.

step5.title: The Product
step5.description: You receive the visual product that helps your company move forward.

cta.title: Ready to bring your vision to life?
cta.subtitle: Check out our previous projects and get inspired.

contact.title: CONTACT
contact.subtitle: Get in touch with us and let's talk about your project!

items.title: Camera Crew and Equipment
items.description: You have a production, but just need the crew and equipment? We're happy to execute the production for you. Anywhere. We're flexible and love to travel for the perfect shot.

items.title: Content Creation
items.description: Visual content according to your wishes. As a company, you have clear messages. We find the right visual language for them and deliver appealing imagery with the right concept.

items.title: Live Broadcast
items.description: Whether streaming or broadcasting at the event. We manage the entire production so everyone can be part of it.

items.title: Post-Production
items.description: We execute post-production according to your wishes. For editing, grading, versioning, or audio design, we rely on state-of-the-art tools and deliver a professional product.

videoGallery.title: Some Projects
videoGallery.subtitle: Discover our latest works and projects

team.title: Meet Our Team
team.subtitle: Since 2018, Sub Sole Films has been successfully producing moving images. From concept to post-production. This team makes it possible:

members.name: Pascal Gysi
members.description: As a trained social anthropologist, linguist, and incorrigible perfectionist, he makes the necessary considerations long before filming the first shot. Timing, staging, composition, lighting – nothing is left to chance on a perfect shoot.

members.name: Jan Baumgartner
members.description: Tech-savvy cameraman with extensive experience in live productions. He keeps his cool on hectic sets.

members.name: Jorge Delgado
members.description: Cinephile and DOP with many years of experience in production and post-production. He completes the filmed material and brings image and sound together in collaboration with Pascal Gysi into a polished product.

members.name: Carlos Zambrano
members.description: Sees the world in RGB and CMYK and dreams of codecs and image formats. He gives the material the final touch and adjusts the output format to your needs.
